hook.label: SSS Stripe Deposit Webhook — register in Stripe Developers → Webhooks

filter.name: Booking found, not already DEPOSIT_PAID, and not Sandbox

mapper.body: {"alert_type": "OPS", "severity": "INFO", "title": "💳 Deposit Received", "body": "${{divide(1.data.object.amount_received; 100)}} deposit confirmed via Stripe. Booking status updated to DEPOSIT_PAID.", "booking_id": "{{4.fields.Booking ID}}", "city": "{{4.fields.City}}", "brand": "{{4.fields.Brand}}"}

{"triggering_event": "Stripe payment_intent.succeeded — deposit", "source_data": "Payment Intent ID: {{1.data.object.id}}, Amount: ${{divide(1.data.object.amount_received; 100)}} {{1.data.object.currency}}, Customer: {{1.data.object.receipt_email}}", "output": "Booking {{4.fields.Booking ID}} updated to DEPOSIT_PAID", "approval_state": "AUTONOMOUS", "brand": "{{4.fields.Brand}}", "city": "{{4.fields.City}}", "environment": "{{4.fields.Environment}}", "destination": "Airtable Bookings (tbl72omPibBkn2hZL)"}

metadata.notes: REBINDING REQUIRED: Airtable connection (modules 4, 7). STRIPE SETUP: register webhook in Stripe → Developers → Webhooks for event payment_intent.succeeded. Copy signing secret into credential vault. PLACEHOLDERS: replace PASTE_SLACK_ALERTS_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE (module 8), https://hook.us2.make.com/n2hr4tzsi66ekeyrt65v5v1k4kg4hmqt (module 9). SAFETY: combined filter on module 7 prevents processing if already DEPOSIT_PAID (idempotency) or Environment = Sandbox. All variables from builtin:SetVariables have been inlined.
